name: Refried Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cooked pinto beans and place them in a large bowl.
2. Mash the beans using a fork or potato masher until they are smooth, but still hold together when pressed.
3. Add the lard or vegetable oil, chile powder, cumin, salt, and pepper to the mashed beans. Mix well.
4. Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add enough oil to coat the bottom of the pan (about 1/2 cup).
5. Once the oil is hot, scoop spoonfuls of the bean mixture into the skillet and fry until golden brown on each side.
6. Remove the fried refried beans from the skillet and serve hot with your favorite toppings.
